content.en:
Han Xuan cultivated at ease in the Xuanyu Pavilion, and Ye Tian didn't care about it anymore.

In the future, Ye Tian will not be able to take care of Han Xuan all the time, and Han Xuan will have to go on his own.

Of course, if Han Xuan had doubts, he would still give some pointers.

The years passed, and a long time passed.

Under the opportunity again and again, Ye Tian paid countless costs, and finally raised his life level by 0.1 again, reaching the level of 9.7.

"Life level 9.7, only 0.2 away from 9.9!"

Ye Tian saw hope and was quite excited in his heart.

Of course, this last 0.2 life level is also like a moat, and it is unimaginably difficult to cross the past!

However, on this day, the Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor of the Ancient Spring Xuanlou brought Ye Tian a chance.

......

Ancient Spring Xuanlou.

The Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor called Ye Tian to him.

"Endless Dao Ancestor, there is an opportunity right now, it is possible to take your life level further, but it is a little dangerous!" said the Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor.

"What chance?"

Ye Tian wanted to know.

As for the danger, he is not afraid!

Immediately, the Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor carefully recounted the opportunity of this time.

"Nine-story Building, Ten Mountains, Demon Sea, Secret Realm, Divine Blood Sect, these five forces have discovered a special mountain in a mysterious place, close to this mountain, and bearing the power of the mountain can improve the level of life. At present, it has been confirmed that it also has a great effect on the half-step sevenfold ancestor whose life level has reached 9 or more, but this mountain will also destroy the body of the half-step sevenfold ancestor, and it must rely on the power of the Yuan Dao to resist, and it can't stay too long, otherwise the physical body will collapse and die. And even if you resist it, there may be sequelae. Plus, the deeper you go, the more dangerous it becomes!"

Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor said.

"There is still a place like this!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised.

But he also knew that this might be an opportunity, otherwise it would be too difficult for him to raise his life level to 9.9!

"Endless Dao Ancestor, you want to go, if you want to go, I can give you a place!" said the Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor.

"I'm going!"

Ye Tian affirmed.

Seeing this, the Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor gave one of the places to Ye Tian, and also advised: "At present, the Ninefold Ancestor of the Five Great Forces is still studying that mountain, so he will not let you go over at present. One thing is for sure, the higher the Yuan Dao realm, the more you can resist the injuries caused by the mountain, so you'd better take this opportunity to raise the Yuan Dao realm a little more!"

"Thank you for the guidance of the Sword Dao Ancestor, I will raise the realm of the Yuan Dao!"

Ye Tianying said.

Subsequently, Ye Tian went back.

......

"Ascend to the realm of the Yuan Dao!"

Ye Tian's current Yuan Dao realm is naturally not low, and in these years, although he has been working hard to improve his life level, other copy bodies are also trying to comprehend the Endless Yuan Dao.

Long before he joined the Nine-Fold Building, his Ninefold Yuan Dao had been elevated to the Dacheng realm, and now he had reached the consummation realm.

From the realm of the Yuan Dao, he was comparable to the average half-step eightfold ancestor.

If he was willing, he even had the hope of raising the Ninefold Yuan Dao to the extreme realm in the half-step Sevenfold Origin Ancestor Realm.

"There are a lot of treasures in the Nine-Story Building that assist in the Yuan Dao, and there is even a Holy Dao Monument!"

That's right, there is a holy monument in the nine-story building.

The Holy Dao Monument is an original antiquity, and one appeared in the boundary of the Hanhai District at the beginning, but those eightfold ancestors couldn't catch the Holy Dao Monument, but the Nine-Story Building could catch it.

It's just that those Yae Ancestors didn't know about it!

At present, there are dozens of Holy Dao Monuments imprisoned in the Nine-Story Building, so there is no shortage of Holy Dao Monuments at present, so there is no interest in other Holy Dao Monuments.

Therefore, for a long time, there have been no top forces to arrest the Holy Dao Monument.

It is not a top force, and it is impossible to capture the live Holy Dao Monument, and even a half-step Ninefold Origin Ancestor can't do it, it must be done by the Ninefold Ancestor himself.

This is also the secret that Ye Tian only learned after joining the Nine Floors!

Once the Holy Dao Monument is completely imprisoned, it will cause an existence that cannot be seen directly, and without the strength of the Ninefold Ancestor, there is no way to deal with that kind of existence.

Subsequently, Ye Tian spent some points to continuously use the Holy Dao Tablet and other treasures to assist in comprehending the Endless Yuan Dao.

Gradually, Ye Tian's Endless Yuan Dao realm was getting higher and higher, and he was getting closer and closer to comprehending the ultimate Endless Yuan Dao.

A long time has passed.

Finally, on this day, Ye Tian's Endless Yuan Dao broke some kind of shackles.

The Endless Yuan Dao has stepped into the extreme realm!

If he now has the cultivation of a half-step eightfold ancestor, he can even directly impact the realm of the eightfold ancestor, which is also the dream of countless half-step eightfold ancestors!

At the beginning, in order to break through his Yuan Dao to the limit realm, the Black Lonely Dao Ancestor devoured the Dao Ancestors of the community realm.

But now, Ye Tian broke this shackle so easily.

After the Endless Yuan Dao broke through to the extreme realm, Ye Tian's strength also skyrocketed, but it didn't help to improve the life level.

Subsequently, Ye Tian took a little more time to perfect his Yuan Dao control skills, all of which were perfected to the level of the Supreme Yuan Dao control skills, and his strength skyrocketed again.

......

"Endless Dao Ancestor, when the time comes, I'll send you to that place!"

The Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor informed Ye Tian and said.

"Good!"

Ye Tian followed the Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor through the teleportation of the Nine-Fold Building, crossed the boundaries of the regions, and soon came to a mysterious place.

Soon.

Ye Tian sensed an incomparably terrifying existence, and even some of them made the Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor extremely respectful, and he didn't dare to offend in the slightest.

Ye Tian knew very well that those Dao Ancestors were estimated to be the Ninefold Origin Ancestors!

In a short time, they came to the mysterious mountain.

This mountain was located in a mysterious place, surrounded by purple light, and a trace of purple light seemed to be able to shatter Ye Tian countless times.

However, these purple rays were stopped by a large array.

"This is it!"

Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor said.

Ye Tian stared at a purple-red mountain not far in front of him, and his body couldn't help but tremble, both attracted and fearful.

At this moment, the voice of a Ninefold Ancestor spread all around.

"The half-step sevenfold ancestor of the five major forces is on the periphery of the mountain, don't go deep, otherwise it will be easy to fall!"

The Ninefold Ancestor only reminded him, and then left the place and entered the depths of the mysterious mountain.

At this time, the Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor also entered the mountain, and it was obvious that he would also enter the mountain to cultivate and improve his life level.

Buzz Buzz !!!

One by one, the half-step sevenfold ancestor entered the periphery of the mountain, did not dare to go deeper, and one by one urged the power of the Ninefold Yuan Dao to form a shield, and the dense Yuan Dao aura wrapped itself, resisting the mysterious power of the mountain, leaving only the beneficial power to refine the body and improve the level of life.

And Ye Tian did the same.

"I hope that I can take advantage of this opportunity to raise my life level to 9.9 in one fell swoop!"

Ye Tian said darkly.
